title: Flyconid
move_pattern: Starts with either Frail Spores or Smash. Then randomly cycles through all three moves with different weights: Vulnerable Spores (50%), Frail Spores (33%), or Smash (17%), unable to repeat the same move twice in a row.
notes: Flyconid relies on spore-based attacks to apply debuffs. The visual effect changes dynamically based on the type of spores being used (vulnerable or frail).
